JURY INSTRUCTED BY THE COURT. JURY DELIBERATES AND REACHES A VERDICT FINDING DEF CHOW NEGLIGENT AND AWARDING PLTF DONOFRIO $6781.44 AND PLTF SPAHN $6089 IN DAMAGES. DEFT & CROSSCOMPLTANT CHOW TO TAKE NOTHING BY WAY OF HIS CROSSCOMPLT AGAINST CROSSDEFT DONOFRIO. EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOW, KEVIN $12,870.44 PRINCIPAL, $648.33 INTEREST, $3,071.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,590.06, OF THE $12,870.44 TOTAL DAMAGES,$6089 IS AWARDED TO SPAHN & $6281.44 TO DONOFRIO. OF THE $648.33 TOTAL INTEREST, $371.14 IS AWARDED TO SPAHN & $277.19 TO DONOFRIO. COSTS PER COST BILL. X-DEFT. WELLSLEY DONOFRIO RECOVER COSTS FROM X-COMPLAINANT KEVIN CHOW IN THE AMOUNT OF $2703.10.
